meals.name: Herb Omelette with Whole-Grain Toast & Berries
meals.image_prompt: fluffy herb omelette folded on a white plate, golden toast on the side, fresh raspberries scattered, natural morning light, wooden table
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat
Whisk 2 eggs (Diego) or 1.5 eggs (Diana) with salt, pepper, 1 tbsp fresh herbs (dill or parsley)
Pour into pan, cook until edges set, fold gently, slide onto plate
Toast 35g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) whole-grain bread, spread thinly with 5g butter
Serve with 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) fresh raspberries

meals.name: Almonds & Nectarine
meals.image_prompt: small handful of raw almonds next to a fresh sliced nectarine on a light blue plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw almonds into a small bowl
Slice 1 medium nectarine, arrange on plate beside almonds

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: golden grilled chicken breast next to roasted zucchini, bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, and fluffy quinoa, drizzled with olive oil, fresh lemon wedge, bright overhead lighting
prep_steps: Cook 800g quinoa (dry measure ~300g) on Sunday, cool and portion
Season and grill 700g chicken breast (raw weight), cool and slice or cube
Roast 400g mixed Mediterranean vegetables (zucchini, bell pepper, eggplant) with 2 tsp olive oil, salt, oregano
day_of_steps: Reheat 100g (Diego) or 70g (Diana) cooked quinoa in microwave (1 min) or warm gently
Reheat 180g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) sliced grilled chicken
Warm 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) roasted vegetables
Arrange on plate, drizzle with 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) fresh lemon juice and 0.5 tsp olive oil
Season with salt, pepper, fresh oregano

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: creamy Greek yogurt in a small glass bowl topped with crushed walnuts, drizzle of honey, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Spoon 150g (Diego) or 120g (Diana) plain Greek yogurt into a bowl
Top with 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) crushed walnuts
Optionally drizzle 5g honey

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon, Green Beans & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: flaky white fish fillet baked with lemon slices on top, steamed green beans and roasted sweet potato wedges on the side, herbs garnish, plate photography in warm light
prep_steps: Portion 550g white fish fillets (e.g. cod, plaice) and wrap individually in foil with lemon, herbs
Trim and blanch 300g green beans, store in container
Bake 500g sweet potatoes, cool, cut into wedges, store ready to reheat
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 180°C (already prepped fish)
Bake foil-wrapped fish 12 min until opaque
Warm 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) green beans in microwave (90 sec)
Warm 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) sweet potato wedges in oven or microwave
Unwrap fish, plate with vegetables, squeeze fresh lemon, drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil
Garnish with fresh parsley

meals.name: Smoked Salmon & Cream Cheese on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: slice of toasted sourdough bread topped with cream cheese, smoked salmon ribbons, capers, fresh dill, and thin lemon slice, morning light on wooden cutting board
day_of_steps: Toast 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) sourdough bread
Spread 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) cream cheese thinly on warm toast
Layer 60g (Diego) or 45g (Diana) smoked salmon on top
Top with 1 tsp capers, fresh dill, and 1 lemon slice
Serve with 1 apple (150g), sliced

meals.name: Cashews & Pear
meals.image_prompt: small pile of raw cashews next to a ripe pear cut into quarters on a white ceramic plate, natural midday light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw cashews
Slice 1 ripe pear (120g), arrange alongside nuts

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets
meals.image_prompt: four golden-brown turkey meatballs on a bed of earthy brown lentil salad with roasted purple beets, cherry tomatoes, fresh herbs, creamy dressing, ceramic bowl, soft natural light
prep_steps: Mix 600g lean ground turkey with 50g whole-grain breadcrumbs, 1 egg, 2 tsp Moroccan spices, form 24 meatballs
Oven-bake at 200°C for 18 min until cooked through, cool
Cook 200g dried brown lentils, dress with 1 tbsp olive oil, lemon juice, salt; add diced cucumber and tomato
Roast 250g beets with 1 tsp olive oil until tender, cool, slice
day_of_steps: Warm 4 (Diego) or 3 (Diana) meatballs in microwave (90 sec)
Arrange 130g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) lentil salad on plate
Top with warm meatballs
Scatter 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) roasted beet slices
Drizzle with 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana) extra olive oil

meals.name: Pistachio & Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: small bowl of shelled pistachios beside two halved kiwi fruits showing green flesh, on light background, bright daylight
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) shelled raw pistachios
Halve 2 kiwis, serve with spoon

meals.name: Pan-Seared Tuna Steak with Sesame Bok Choy & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: medium-rare seared tuna steak with sesame seeds, glossy bok choy with soy sauce on the side, fluffy brown rice, white plate, warm restaurant lighting
prep_steps: Cook 180g dried brown rice (yields ~540g cooked), cool and portion
Trim 500g fresh tuna steaks, store in refrigerator
Blanch 400g bok choy until tender-crisp, cool, store separately
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat
Season 130g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) tuna steak with salt, pepper
Sear 2–3 min per side for medium-rare
Warm 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) cooked brown rice
Toss 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) blanched bok choy with 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) soy sauce and sesame seeds
Plate tuna, rice, and bok choy together

meals.name: Kefir Bowl with Granola & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: creamy kefir in a bowl topped with granola clusters and fresh blueberries, honey drizzle, white ceramic bowl, soft natural window light
day_of_steps: Pour 200ml (Diego) or 160ml (Diana) plain kefir into a bowl
Top with 30g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) whole-grain granola
Scatter 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) fresh blueberries
Drizzle 5g (Diego) or 4g (Diana) honey
Serve with 1 orange, peeled and segmented

meals.name: Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: small glass bowl with a handful of raw walnut pieces and a pile of fresh blueberries, minimalist presentation, natural light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw walnut pieces
Add 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) fresh blueberries

meals.name: Lean Beef & Chickpea Taco Bowls (Mexican Style)
meals.image_prompt: colorful Mexican rice bowl with seasoned lean ground beef, chickpeas, shredded red cabbage, diced avocado, corn, lime wedge, cilantro garnish, warm lighting
prep_steps: Brown 550g lean ground beef (5% fat) with cumin, chilli powder, garlic, salt; cool
Cook 150g dried chickpeas or use canned, season with lime and cilantro
Cook 150g long-grain brown rice, cool
Shred 200g red cabbage, dice 150g fresh tomato, prep 1 avocado
day_of_steps: Warm 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) cooked brown rice in bowl
Top with 110g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) seasoned lean beef
Add 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) cooked chickpeas
Scatter 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) shredded red cabbage
Add 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) diced tomato and 30g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) diced avocado
Squeeze lime juice, garnish with fresh cilantro
Drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil

meals.name: Hummus & Vegetable Sticks
meals.image_prompt: bowl of creamy hummus (chickpea dip) surrounded by carrot sticks, bell pepper strips, and celery pieces, white plate, natural diffused light
prep_steps: Prepare or purchase 200g good-quality hummus
Cut 150g carrot into batons, 100g bell pepper into strips, 100g celery into batons
day_of_steps: Spoon 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) hummus into a small bowl
Arrange 70g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) mixed vegetable sticks alongside

meals.name: Herb-Roasted Chicken Thighs with Ratatouille & Farro
meals.image_prompt: golden herb-roasted chicken thigh on a bed of colorful ratatouille with eggplant, zucchini, tomato, and fluffy farro grain, fresh basil garnish, warm plate
prep_steps: Season 700g boneless chicken thighs with herbs, oven-roast at 190°C for 25 min, cool and portion
Prepare ratatouille: sauté 150g diced eggplant, 150g zucchini, 120g red bell pepper, 200g tomato with 1.5 tsp olive oil, garlic, herbs; simmer 20 min
Cook 150g dried farro, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Warm 120g (Diego) or 90g (Diana) herb-roasted chicken thigh
Warm 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) ratatouille
Warm 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) cooked farro
Arrange on plate with fresh basil garnish
Drizzle with 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana) extra virgin olive oil

meals.name: Poached Eggs with Whole-Grain Sourdough & Tomato
meals.image_prompt: two poached eggs on toasted sourdough, roasted tomato slices on the side, sprinkled with fresh parsley and sea salt, cast-iron plate, morning natural light
day_of_steps: Bring small pot of water to gentle simmer, add pinch of vinegar
Crack 2 (Diego) or 1.5 (Diana) eggs into ramekin, slide gently into water, poach 3–4 min
Toast 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) sourdough bread
Slice and toast 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) tomato in a dry pan, season with salt, pepper
Plate toast, top with poached egg(s), scatter tomato alongside
Drizzle with 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil
Garnish with fresh parsley

meals.name: Almonds & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: handful of raw almonds in a small ceramic cup next to fresh whole strawberries on a light blue napkin, bright natural light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw almonds
Slice or halve 120g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) fresh strawberries

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Root Vegetables & Barley
meals.image_prompt: golden-seared salmon fillet skin-side up on a bed of roasted carrots, parsnips, and beetroot, fluffy pearl barley on the side, lemon wedge, dill garnish, warm overhead light
prep_steps: Portion 550g salmon fillets, season, store refrigerated
Roast 200g carrot chunks, 150g parsnip chunks, 150g beetroot chunks with 1.5 tsp olive oil until caramelised
Cook 160g dried pearl barley, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in skillet over medium-high heat
Sear 140g (Diego) or 110g (Diana) salmon skin-side down, 4–5 min; flip, cook 2 min more
Warm 90g (Diego) or 70g (Diana) roasted root vegetables
Warm 90g (Diego) or 70g (Diana) cooked pearl barley
Plate salmon, vegetables, barley together
Squeeze fresh lemon juice, garnish with fresh dill

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with crushed shelled pistachios and a drizzle of raw honey, ceramic bowl, white background, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Spoon 160g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) plain Greek yogurt into a bowl
Top with 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) crushed shelled pistachios
Optional: drizzle 5g honey

meals.name: Asian-Style Chicken Stir-Fry with Broccoli, Snap Peas & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: wok-fried sliced chicken breast with steamed broccoli florets and snap peas, glossy ginger-soy sauce coating, served over brown rice, sesame garnish, hot plate, restaurant lighting
prep_steps: Slice 600g chicken breast thinly (5 mm), marinate in 1 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce + 1 tsp ginger
Cut 300g broccoli into florets, trim 200g snap peas
Cook 150g dried brown rice, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Heat 1.5 tsp sesame oil in a large wok or skillet over high heat
Stir-fry 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) marinated chicken until golden, remove
Stir-fry 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) broccoli + 60g (Diego) or 45g (Diana) snap peas for 3–4 min
Return chicken, add 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) soy sauce, toss 1 min
Serve over 90g (Diego) or 70g (Diana) warm cooked brown rice
Garnish with sesame seeds, sliced green onion

meals.name: Turkey & Cheese Omelette with Whole-Grain Toast
meals.image_prompt: folded omelette with melted cheese and diced turkey, golden-brown whole-grain toast on side, fresh pear slices, white plate, warm natural light
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan over medium heat
Whisk 2 (Diego) or 1.5 (Diana) eggs with salt, pepper
Pour into pan, add 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) grated Emmental or similar cheese mid-way
Scatter 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) finely diced cooked turkey breast
Fold when edges set, slide onto plate
Toast 35g (Diego) or 25g (Diana) whole-grain bread, spread thinly with 4g (Diego) or 3g (Diana) butter
Serve with 1 medium pear, sliced

meals.name: Cashews & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: small bowl of raw cashew halves with fresh blueberries scattered on top, white ceramic, natural window light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw cashews
Add 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) fresh blueberries

meals.name: French-Style Lentil & Vegetable Soup with Crusty Bread
meals.image_prompt: hearty green lentil soup (soupe aux lentilles corail) with celery, carrot, and fresh parsley garnish in a white bowl, crusty bread on the side, warm lighting
prep_steps: Sauté 100g diced carrot, 80g diced celery (no raw onion), 50g diced leek in 1.5 tsp olive oil
Add 200g dried green lentils, 800ml low-sodium vegetable stock, 1 bay leaf, thyme
Simmer 35–40 min until lentils tender but not mushy
Season with salt, pepper, cool and portion
day_of_steps: Reheat 350ml (Diego) or 280ml (Diana) lentil soup in microwave or stovetop (2–3 min)
Pour into a bowl
Top with 1 tbsp fresh parsley
Serve with 30g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) crusty sourdough bread on the side
Drizzle 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana) extra virgin olive oil

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: small ceramic cup with a handful of raw almonds, fresh sliced red apple on white napkin beside, natural afternoon light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw almonds
Slice 1 medium apple (150g), serve with nuts

meals.name: Turkey Meatballs with Tomato-Lentil Sauce & Whole-Grain Pasta
meals.image_prompt: three herb turkey meatballs in a rich red tomato-lentil sauce, served over fluffy whole-grain pappardelle pasta, Parmesan shavings, fresh basil, warm plate, restaurant lighting
prep_steps: Mix 600g lean ground turkey with 60g whole-grain breadcrumbs, 1 egg, 1 tsp Italian herbs, form 24 small meatballs
Bake at 200°C for 18 min, cool
Simmer 150g diced canned tomato, 100g cooked brown lentils, 1 tbsp tomato puree, garlic, herbs for 20 min
Cook 160g dried whole-grain pasta, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Warm 4 (Diego) or 3 (Diana) turkey meatballs in microwave (90 sec)
Warm 120ml (Diego) or 100ml (Diana) tomato-lentil sauce on stovetop
Warm 90g (Diego) or 70g (Diana) cooked whole-grain pasta
Toss pasta with sauce and meatballs
Top with 10g (Diego) or 8g (Diana) grated Parmesan and fresh basil

meals.name: Cottage Cheese Bowl with Berries & Granola
meals.image_prompt: creamy cottage cheese in a white bowl topped with mixed red and black berries, granola crumble, honey drizzle, on a wooden table, soft natural morning light
day_of_steps: Spoon 180g (Diego) or 150g (Diana) plain cottage cheese into a bowl
Top with 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) mixed berries (raspberries, blueberries, blackberries)
Sprinkle 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) whole-grain granola
Drizzle 5g (Diego) or 4g (Diana) honey
Serve with 1 orange, peeled and segmented

meals.name: Walnuts & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: small white bowl with walnut pieces and fresh red raspberries, light background, natural bright light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) raw walnut pieces
Add 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) fresh raspberries

meals.name: Baked Cod with Roasted Fennel, Carrot & Farro
meals.image_prompt: flaky white cod fillet baked with lemon, surrounded by caramelised roasted fennel wedges and roasted carrot batons, fluffy pearl farro grain, fresh dill, warm plate
prep_steps: Portion 550g cod fillets in foil with lemon, herbs, store refrigerated
Roast 200g fennel wedges, 200g carrot batons with 1.5 tsp olive oil, salt, until golden
Cook 150g dried pearl farro, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 180°C
Bake foil-wrapped cod 12 min until opaque
Warm 100g (Diego) or 80g (Diana) roasted fennel and carrot
Warm 85g (Diego) or 65g (Diana) cooked pearl farro
Unwrap cod, plate with vegetables and farro
Squeeze fresh lemon, drizzle 0.75 tsp (Diego) or 0.5 tsp (Diana) olive oil
Garnish with fresh dill

meals.name: Hummus & Carrot Sticks
meals.image_prompt: bowl of creamy hummus surrounded by fresh carrot batons and red bell pepper strips on a light ceramic plate, bright natural light
day_of_steps: Portion 60g (Diego) or 50g (Diana) hummus into a bowl
Arrange 80g (Diego) or 65g (Diana) fresh carrot batons and 15g (Diego) or 10g (Diana) bell pepper strips

meals.name: Grilled Beef Sirloin Steak with Asparagus & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: juicy rare-to-medium beef sirloin steak with fresh rosemary, tender grilled asparagus spears, roasted sweet potato wedges, warm plate, restaurant-style plating
prep_steps: Trim 500g lean beef sirloin steak (visible fat removed), season and chill
Trim 250g fresh asparagus spears
Roast 400g sweet potato wedges with 1 tsp olive oil, store
day_of_steps: Preheat grill or heavy skillet over high heat
Grill 130g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) sirloin steak, 4–5 min per side for medium-rare, rest 2 min
Grill or sauté 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) asparagus spears with 0.5 tsp olive oil, salt, 3 min
Warm 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) roasted sweet potato
Plate steak, asparagus, sweet potato together
Squeeze fresh lemon, garnish with fresh rosemary

meals.name: Poached Eggs with Avocado Toast & Berries
meals.image_prompt: two poached eggs on whole-grain toast spread with mashed avocado, scattered microgreens, fresh raspberries on the side, sunny plate, natural morning light
day_of_steps: Bring water to gentle simmer, add pinch of vinegar
Crack 2 (Diego) or 1.5 (Diana) eggs into ramekin, slide into water, poach 3–4 min
Toast 40g (Diego) or 30g (Diana) whole-grain bread
Mash 1/4 (Diego) or 1/6 (Diana) avocado with lemon juice, salt
Spread on warm toast, top with poached egg(s)
Scatter 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) fresh raspberries on side
Garnish with fresh microgreens

meals.name: Pistachios & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: small pile of shelled pistachios next to fresh whole strawberries on a white plate, natural bright midday light
day_of_steps: Portion 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) shelled raw pistachios
Slice or halve 120g (Diego) or 100g (Diana) fresh strawberries

meals.name: Mediterranean Chickpea & Vegetable Traybake with Feta
meals.image_prompt: roasted tray with golden chickpeas, cubed eggplant, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, crumbled feta cheese, olive oil drizzle, fresh oregano, warm evening light
prep_steps: Toss 300g cooked chickpeas with 150g cubed eggplant, 150g zucchini chunks, 120g halved cherry tomatoes, 2 tsp olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt
Roast at 210°C for 25 min until golden and caramelised, cool
day_of_steps: Warm 200g (Diego) or 160g (Diana) roasted chickpea traybake in oven (5 min) or microwave (2 min)
Top with 25g (Diego) or 20g (Diana) crumbled feta cheese
Drizzle with 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana) extra virgin olive oil
Garnish with fresh oregano and parsley
Serve with 1 small wholemeal roll (40g Diego, 30g Diana) on the side

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Almonds & Honey
meals.image_prompt: thick creamy Greek yogurt in a glass topped with crushed almonds and a generous honey drizzle, white ceramic spoon, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Spoon 170g (Diego) or 140g (Diana) plain Greek yogurt into a bowl
Top with 20g (Diego) or 15g (Diana) crushed raw almonds
Drizzle 6g (Diego) or 5g (Diana) raw honey

meals.name: Herb-Crusted White Fish with Roasted Root Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: herb-crusted white fish fillet baked until golden, surrounded by roasted parsnip, carrot, and beetroot wedges, fluffy fluffy quinoa, lemon wedge, thyme garnish, warm plate
prep_steps: Mix 30g whole-grain breadcrumbs with 1 tbsp fresh herbs (parsley, dill), coat 550g white fish fillets, refrigerate
Roast 200g carrot chunks, 150g parsnip chunks, 150g beetroot chunks with 1.5 tsp olive oil at 210°C for 25 min
Cook 180g dried quinoa, cool, portion
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 190°C
Bake herb-crusted 140g (Diego) or 110g (Diana) fish fillet 13–15 min until cooked
Warm 95g (Diego) or 75g (Diego) roasted root vegetables
Warm 95g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) cooked quinoa
Plate fish, vegetables, quinoa together
Squeeze fresh lemon, drizzle 0.5 tsp (Diego) or 0.4 tsp (Diana) olive oil
Garnish with fresh thyme
